gin: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Hinukh.
ins: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Indian Sign Language.
ism: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Masimasi.
mig: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for San Miguel el Grande Mixtec.
mim: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Alacatlatzala Mixtec.
miming: verb. present participle and gerund of mime
minim: noun. A half note, drawn as a semibreve with a stem.
mis: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for unencoded languages.
nim: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Nilamba.
nims: verb. third-person singular simple present indicative of nim
sign: noun. A visible fact that shows that something exists or may happen.
sim: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Mende (New Guinea).
sing: verb. To produce musical or harmonious sounds with one’s voice.
swim: verb. To move through the water, without touching the bottom; to propel oneself in water by natural means.
swimming: noun. The act or art of sustaining and propelling the body in water.
swing: verb. To rotate about an off-centre fixed point.
wig: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Wik-Ngathana.
win: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Winnebago.
wing: noun. An appendage of an animal 's (bird, bat, insect) body that enables it to fly.
wising: verb. present participle and gerund of wise
